column1: # output_field_map.tsv  -  comm-structure field -> document header source field
# Used by sap_output_walk.ps1 ONLY as an OVERRIDE / fallback. The walk is primarily
# DYNAMIC: for each B-table access key field it reads T682Z (ZIFNA<-QUFNA) to learn
# the source comm-structure field, then resolves that field's value from the document:
#   1. Billing partner fields (KUNRE/KUNWE/KUNAG/KUNRG) -> VBPA by partner function
#      (RE/WE/AG/RG), falling back to VBRK-KUNRG  -- handled IN CODE, no row needed.
#   2. A source field that exists DIRECTLY on the header (VBRK / EKKO) is read as-is
#      -- no row needed (covers VKORG, SPART, FKART, EKORG, BSART, LIFNR, BUKRS, ...).
#   3. Otherwise this file is consulted: (kappl, komb_field) -> a header source field.
#   4. Still unresolved -> the access is COULD_NOT_CHECK (never a false NO_RECORD).
# Add a row only for a comm-structure field that is NEITHER a standard partner field
# NOR a same-named header field (typically a customer user-exit field, KOMKBZ*/KOMPBZ*).
# Customer override file: {custom_url}\output_field_map.tsv (merged, second wins).
# Columns (TAB-separated):
#   kappl        V3 (billing) | EF (purchasing)
#   komb_field   the communication-structure field name (T682Z-QUFNA)
#   source_table VBRK | VBRP | EKKO | EKPO   (documentation only; engine reads the header)
#   source_field the header field that holds the value
#   note         free text
kappl
# --- seed rows (examples; extend per project) ------------------------------
